text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Starting today, my trainee and I will be taking on
the Twinkle Series. The Umamusume joining me
for this journey is none other than...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
Hopefully... I can maybe... um, build confidence
by racing...

text_block_list.name: Meisho Doto
text_block_list.text:
I-I know this is asking for a lot! But someday, I
want to become a version of myself I like! I-I-I'll
do my best!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
And so, <chrname> and I take our
first steps towards competing in the Twinkle
Series!
